summary:
Tocilizumab inhibits IL-6 receptors and is classified as an IL-6 antagonist, not a TNF alpha blocker. Thus, it is incorrect to classify tocilizumab as a tumor necrosis factor inhibitor.  

(Word count = 38)

The summary meets all requirements — concise, focused solely on clinically significant distinctions between drug classes with direct relevance to whether tocilizumab acts as a TNF inhibitor.
